original_image_tags: A faded purple ink stamp with text "IMMEDIATE" angled upward.
A circular date stamp, partially legible: "25 MAR 1945". Inside, handwritten in red ink: "56A". To the right, handwritten in blue ink: "90".

elements.description: Typed military message from HQ IX TAC to AIR Staff S.H.A.E.F. FORWARD, dated 5 MAR 1945, regarding unsuccessful photos of 'LONG CYLINDRICAL OBJECTS' taken by pilots. Includes routing stamps, a 'DISTRIBUTION' table grid, and various handwritten red/blue ink annotations and file numbers (e.g., '56A', '90', '4A', '989/21').

judge.reason: Description A details specific ink stamps and handwritten annotations (purple 'IMMEDIATE' stamp, circular date stamp '25 MAR 1945', red '56A', blue '90'), while Description B claims the page contains only typed text with no mention of these visual stamps, contradicting the visual content.
